title: limonium australe var. baudinii
intro: Limonium australe var. baudinii, also known as Sea Lavender or Coastal Rosemary, is a variety of the Limonium australe plant, which is a flowering plant in the Plumbaginaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Limonium australe var. baudinii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
